100 Computer-Assisted Stories notice

September 1996
Investigative MethodsJournalism & Newsroom

IRE and NICAR have published '100 Computer-Assisted Stories,' a collection of accounts from newspaper and television reporters about their investigative projects using computer tools. The guide costs $20 and can be ordered by phone.

"100 Computer-Assisted Stories" is published by IRE and NICAR. Newspaper and television reporters recount how they got the story. The price is $20. To order, call (573) 882-2042.

Similar Articles
